The current visit record does not provide explicit evidence of a diagnosed "Disorder of Lipid Metabolism." While the patient is prescribed Atorvastatin, which is a medication commonly used to manage lipid levels, there is no indication in the diagnoses or clinical details that confirms the presence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia or hyperlipidemia. The diagnoses listed focus on epilepsy and chronic kidney disease, with no mention of any lipid abnormalities or ongoing management of a lipid disorder. Therefore, based on the information provided, I cannot predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the next hospital visit.
